description: next/ v2.0 — intelligence-engine configuration object: a rule that auto-resolves or proposes resolutions for discrepancies. Stub so Discrepancy.RESOLVED_BY_RULE and ResolutionProposal.PROPOSED_BY_RULE resolve. Validated by the canonical intelligence schema (out of scope for the unified profile-schema).

attributes.name: rule_type
attributes.description: Kind of rule (e.g. auto_resolve, propose, suppress).

relationships.description: The discrepancy class/instances this rule acts on.

isa95.note: OSF intelligence extension — engine config, not an ISA-95 MOM object.
